Wizard: Starting with Dealing with Magical Plants

巫师：从处理魔植开始

Author: 佚名
Read Chapter 1 Add to Library
195 Chapters Ongoing Status
Categories
  • Fantasy
About Chapters

Summary

Gods raise pious lambs, while wizards reap the fruits called "gods." This is a world dominated by extraordinary wizards, and Roland unexpectedly transmigrates here, becoming one of many wizarding apprentices. Carrying his own player panel, Roland embarks on his wizarding journey. Researching potions, concocting bloodlines, modifying spells, conquering the astral planes, hunting gods, pursuing truth—his shadow is present in everything. Several stellar years later, a figure appears on the Throne of Truth, researching the birth and destruction of planes. "Knowledge is the source of all power; those who only know how to fight and kill are merely slaves to strength." —Shadow of the Mortal World, Seeker of Truth, Ring of Truth, Crown of the Sun—Roland.
